The Pink Payroll Way

You're Just a Ticket Number.

Direct Access.

A real person who knows your business and picks up the phone.

The Nightmare of Switching.

🚀

We Drive the Transition.

We handle the data migration so you don't have to.

📹 15-Minute Zoom Call

Let's Do a "Vibe Check"

No high-pressure sales pitches. No office visits. Just a quick, casual Zoom call to see if we're the right fit for your business. We'll show you exactly how the 3-month credit works and how we handle the move for you.

⚡ Flash Bonus

$0 Switching Fees if you book your Zoom call in the next 24 hours.

We do the heavy lifting of loading your data, you keep the money in your pocket. A truly risk-free switch.

Grab a 15-Min Spot on the Calendar

Get 3 Months Free upon switching

Our Team: Your Personal Payroll Department

We are a boutique payroll agency based in San Diego, specializing in high-touch service for California employers. Instead of a revolving door of call center agents, you get direct access to a dedicated leadership team with decades of tax and payroll expertise. We treat your business like our own — providing the human oversight and "second set of eyes" that big-box corporations simply can't offer.

Pink Payroll

4079 Governor Drive, #5040, San Diego, CA 92122
